hero.preloaderCaption: Meet Modular Houses® - modern, cozy and customizable homes.
hero.ipNotice: © Modular Houses® - Protected design and concept. All rights reserved.

intro.label: (Intro)
intro.copy: Welcome to the world of custom modular houses, where we blend modern architecture with nature. Our homes are built without foundations - quickly and precisely - and placed in some of the most beautiful locations. A place where you can be with yourself and your loved ones.
intro.metaLeft: A place to experience unforgettable moments in nature.

products.heading: Choose the one you like best
products.intro: You can choose one of our premium modular models. Each provides the highest quality and meets the standards adjusted to your needs.

items.name: Atrijum Koncept®
items.desc: Atrijum Koncept® boasts refined aesthetics and a modern interior, creating an intimate retreat in the heart of nature.

items.name: Glamping Koncept®
items.desc: The most prestigious model - the biggest terrace and jacuzzi with an amazing view of the surroundings.

items.name: Kamp Koncept®
items.desc: With its striking architecture and upscale amenities, Kamp Koncept® offers an exclusive retreat in the heart of the landscape.

items.name: Wellness®
items.desc: Wellness® nestles into a wooded retreat with floor-to-ceiling glass and a warm timber interior, steps from the trees.

moduli.tagline: Architecture of the future - tailored to you
moduli.heading: Choose a module
moduli.subtitle: Start with a base model
moduli.featuresLine: All modules · Energy efficient · ISO certified · 48h assembly

points.title: Fast assembly
points.desc: Installed on site in just a few days.

points.title: Adaptable design
points.desc: Configure the layout, cladding and details.

points.title: Long-term value
points.desc: Durable materials and low maintenance costs.

descriptions.large-modul: A spacious module for family living, with high ceilings and full daylight. Ideal as a permanent home in nature.
descriptions.small-modul: A compact, efficient space - perfect as a weekend retreat or a studio surrounded by greenery.
descriptions.small-modul-v2: An optimized take on the small module, with a smarter layout and a more accessible price point.

features.heading: All Modular Houses® homes-are built based on the same rules:

title: Green silence
a module that disappears into the forest
desc: A home that blends into the canopy,
quiet and almost unseen among the trees.

title: Nature as the interior
when the boundary disappears
desc: between the outside and the inside.

title: Minimalism in the heart of nature
less is more
desc: a space distilled to its essence.

items.quote: Staying at Modular Houses redefined my retreat - modern design meets nature, and every sunset feels like a serene masterpiece.
items.name: Marcus Simpson

items.quote: Modular Houses offered the perfect escape - sleek, modern spaces surrounded by natural stillness. Each moment felt peaceful, grounded, and truly unique.
items.name: Lena Morrison

items.quote: Modular Houses was the perfect hideaway - stylish, peaceful, and fully surrounded by stunning views day and night.
items.name: Jason Whitaker

about.label: About
about.headline: Two people. One vision. Modular Houses.

founders.name: Milan Vlajić
founders.quote: As the founder of Modular Houses, I have devoted my career to developing and advancing modular construction. I am the originator of the Modular Houses project, with a vision to offer high-quality, modern and functional living solutions that meet the needs of contemporary life. Through a commitment to innovation, build quality and client satisfaction, my goal is for modular construction to become recognized as a reliable, efficient and lasting way of living. I believe that every successful project begins with a good idea and ends with the trust we build with our clients.

founders.name: Miloš Simić
founders.quote: For years I have been dedicated to developing sales, marketing and client communication in the field of modular construction. As Head of Sales & Marketing at Modular Houses, my focus is on connecting innovative living solutions with people looking for a quality, functional and modern space to live in. I believe trust is the foundation of every successful project, which is why I strive to give every client clear information, expert support and certainty throughout the entire process - from the first idea to moving in.

about.manifesto: Modular Houses isn't just a company - it's a way of thinking about space, life and the future.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: Clear communication from idea to move-in.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: Modular construction as an answer to the future.

process.title: Consultation
process.desc: A conversation about your needs, wishes and budget - the foundation of every good project.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Concept design and technical documentation tailored to your space and the way you live.

process.title: Production
process.desc: Modules built in controlled factory conditions, with precision and quality control.

process.title: Transport
process.desc: Delivery of the finished modules to your location - safely and right on time.

process.title: Assembly
process.desc: On-site assembly and handover of the keys within just a few days.
